dashboard.label: GenAI Compliance Overview
dashboard.description: Universal GenAI and Agentic AI compliance posture dashboard. Works with any otel:agentic:json sourcetype data.

search.query: `acme_genai_index` `acme_last_24h` incident_id=* testbed_mode=KILL_CHAIN_ACTIVE | stats dc(incident_id) as count | fields count
`acme_genai_index` `acme_last_7d` | stats dc(agent.id) as count | fields count

chart.title: Security Events Over Time by Severity

search.query: `acme_genai_index` `acme_last_7d` | timechart count by framework.severity span=1h | fillnull value=0
`acme_genai_index` `acme_last_7d` framework.tactic_name=* | stats count by framework.tactic_name | sort -count | head 12

table.title: OWASP LLM Top 10 — Active Risk Status

search.query: `acme_genai_index` `acme_last_7d` | lookup acme_owasp_llm_lookup id AS framework.owasp_llm OUTPUTNEW name severity | mvexpand framework.owasp_llm | search framework.owasp_llm=LLM* | stats count AS events, max(framework.cvss_score) AS max_cvss, dc(agent.id) AS agents_affected BY framework.owasp_llm | lookup acme_owasp_llm_lookup id AS framework.owasp_llm OUTPUTNEW name | eval risk_status=case(events>0 AND max_cvss>=9.0,"🔴 CRITICAL ACTIVE",events>0 AND max_cvss>=7.0,"🟠 HIGH ACTIVE",events>0,"🟡 ACTIVE",1=1,"🟢 NOT OBSERVED") | eval max_cvss=round(max_cvss,1) | table framework.owasp_llm name risk_status events max_cvss agents_affected | rename framework.owasp_llm AS "OWASP ID", name AS "Risk Name", risk_status AS "Status", events AS "Events (7d)", max_cvss AS "Max CVSS", agents_affected AS "Agents Affected" | sort "OWASP ID"

format.colorPalette: {"🔴 CRITICAL ACTIVE":#dc4e41,"🟠 HIGH ACTIVE":#f1813f,"🟡 ACTIVE":#f8be34,"🟢 NOT OBSERVED":#53a051}

table.title: OWASP ASI Agentic Top 10 — Active Risk Status

search.query: `acme_genai_index` `acme_last_7d` | mvexpand framework.owasp_asi | search framework.owasp_asi=ASI* | stats count AS events, max(framework.cvss_score) AS max_cvss, dc(agent.id) AS agents_affected BY framework.owasp_asi | lookup acme_owasp_asi_lookup id AS framework.owasp_asi OUTPUTNEW name | eval risk_status=case(events>0 AND max_cvss>=9.0,"🔴 CRITICAL ACTIVE",events>0 AND max_cvss>=7.0,"🟠 HIGH ACTIVE",events>0,"🟡 ACTIVE",1=1,"🟢 NOT OBSERVED") | eval max_cvss=round(max_cvss,1) | table framework.owasp_asi name risk_status events max_cvss agents_affected | rename framework.owasp_asi AS "ASI ID", name AS "Risk Name", risk_status AS "Status", events AS "Events (7d)", max_cvss AS "Max CVSS", agents_affected AS "Agents Affected" | sort "ASI ID"

format.colorPalette: {"🔴 CRITICAL ACTIVE":#dc4e41,"🟠 HIGH ACTIVE":#f1813f,"🟡 ACTIVE":#f8be34,"🟢 NOT OBSERVED":#53a051}

search.query: `acme_genai_index` `acme_last_7d` agent.id=* | stats count AS events, avg(framework.cvss_score) AS avg_cvss, max(framework.cvss_score) AS max_cvss, dc(framework.technique_id) AS unique_ttps BY agent.id | eval avg_cvss=round(avg_cvss,2), max_cvss=round(max_cvss,1) | eval risk_tier=case(max_cvss>=9.0,"CRITICAL",max_cvss>=7.0,"HIGH",max_cvss>=4.0,"MEDIUM",1=1,"LOW") | sort -max_cvss | head 10 | table agent.id risk_tier events unique_ttps avg_cvss max_cvss | rename agent.id AS "Agent ID", risk_tier AS "Risk Tier", events AS "Events", unique_ttps AS "Unique TTPs", avg_cvss AS "Avg CVSS", max_cvss AS "Max CVSS"

`acme_genai_index` `acme_last_24h` defenseclaw_action=* | table _time agent.id framework.technique_id framework.technique_name defenseclaw_action defenseclaw_rule_id framework.severity | sort -_time | head 20 | rename _time AS "Time", agent.id AS "Agent", framework.technique_id AS "Technique", framework.technique_name AS "Technique Name", defenseclaw_action AS "Action", defenseclaw_rule_id AS "Rule ID", framework.severity AS "Severity"
